docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,287.00 FILED BY MILES, MYA AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE TOW INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-23-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-23-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-23-2025 BY JUDGE PRO TEM - PLAINTIFF MYA MILES IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE TOW INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY EDGARDO PALACIOS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAWN PAYNE; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY MILES, MYA GOLDEN GATE TOW INC
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE TOW INC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-23-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MILES, MYA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE TOW INC $274.68 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $304.68, PLAINTIFF MET HER BURDEN OF PROOF AS TO THE MISSING CAR JACK. SHE DID NOT MET HER BURDEN OF PROOF AS TO THE REMAINING ITEMS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
